Sterile is step one.
Sealed is step two.

Now that you've purchased Medisca sterile vials, completing the vial system is the next step. Many pharmacies choose Steri-Tamp® seals for added protection and to safeguard compounded medications after first access. 

Complete your vial system
Protection you can see and trust
Steri-Tamp® vial seals integrate seamlessly into your compounding workflow, helping protect medications stored in vials.
  • Barrier protection: Reduces contamination risk between withdrawals
  • Tamper evidence: Visible proof of vial access
  • Validated performance: Tested to prevent bacterial ingress and maintain sterility
  • Simple integration: Applies in seconds with no workflow changes
Shop Steri-Tamp
Extend protection
beyond the vial
Medisca sterile vials and Steri-Tamp® seals create a complete vial system for: 

• Maintaining sterility after access
• Reducing contamination risk
• Improving tamper visibility
• Supporting safe handling
